name: early-reader-memory-mvp
description: A small web MVP that helps early elementary students practice reading, sight words, and age-appropriate memory skills.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/server.mjs && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/data/content.js && node --check src/services/progressStore.js && node --check src/features/readingPractice.js && node --check src/features/memoryGame.js && node --check src/features/progressDashboard.js
